Title: @tdurieux/anonymous_github Vulnerable to XSS via Unsanitized GitHub Repository Content Rendering in Anonymous GitHub Origin
Description: Anonymous GitHub fetches repository content (e.g., markdown files) from GitHub's API and renders it without sanitization. On the client side, markdown is parsed with `marked` (with `sanitize: false`) and injected into the DOM via `$sce.trustAsHtml()` + `ng-bind-html`, bypassing AngularJS's built-in XSS protection. An attacker can craft a malicious GitHub repository whose README executes arbitrary JavaScript in the Anonymous GitHub origin.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2.2.0, all versions starting from 2.3.0
